    Serialized Form

        class FileOperationException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

        class InvalidDataException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

        class PlaylistException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

        class SongNotFoundException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

    • Package playlist.models

      • Class playlist.models.Playlist

        class Playlist extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • description
            String description
          • name
            String name
            Инициализира нов плейлист с име и описание.
          • songs
            List<Song> songs

      • Class playlist.models.PlaylistHistory

        class PlaylistHistory extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • playbackTime
            LocalDateTime playbackTime
            Точната дата и час на пускане на песента.
          • playlistName
            String playlistName
            Име на плейлиста, от който е пусната песента (може да бъде null).
          • song
            Song song
            Песента, която е била пусната.

        class Song extends Object implements Serializable

          • album
            String album
          • artist
            String artist
          • duration
            String duration
          • genre
            Genre genre
          • id

          • title
